models.name: csod_training_records
models.description: Cornerstone OnDemand training records and completion tracking by the employee by division for the organization. This table covers completion rates by division, including how many assignments were completed on time versus late

relationship.description: Foreign key relationship to workday_employee_skills_development.employee_id - enables linking training assignments to skill development outcomes for the same employee

properties.description: Employee ID as a primary key identifier for the employee
Full name of the employee
ID of the user or Unique identifier for the employee

relationship.description: Reference relationship to workday_employee_skills_development.manager_name - enables consistent manager-level reporting across training completion and skill development

properties.description: Name of the employee's manager
Type/category of the training

relationship.description: Foreign key relationship to workday_employee_skills_development.training_curriculum_title - connects training programs to their skill development outcomes

properties.description: Title of the curriculum or training program
Specific title of the training activity
Current status of the training transcript in. Values possible are Assigned / Satisfied / Expired / Waived and other possible values

relationship.description: Reference relationship to workday_employee_skills_development.division - enables division-level cross-analysis of training completion and skill development metrics

properties.description: Business division name or department name that the employee belongs to
Job position or role of the employee
Date when the training was assigned
Date when the training was completed by the employee. For any training related questions use this column
Due date for completing the training by the employee. For any training related questions use this column
Indicator if training was completed after due date by the employee
Timestamp when the record was created
Timestamp when the record was last updated

columns.name: is_completed
columns.expression: CASE WHEN transcript_status = 'Satisfied' THEN true ELSE false END

properties.description: Whether the training has been completed by the employee

columns.name: is_overdue
columns.expression: CASE WHEN due_date < CURRENT_DATE AND transcript_status NOT IN ('Satisfied', 'Waived') THEN true ELSE false END

properties.description: Whether the training is past due and incomplete by the employee

columns.name: completion_days
columns.expression: CASE WHEN completed_date IS NOT NULL AND assigned_date IS NOT NULL THEN DATEDIFF(day, assigned_date, completed_date) END

properties.description: Number of days from assignment to completion by the employee

columns.name: days_overdue
columns.expression: CASE WHEN due_date < CURRENT_DATE AND transcript_status NOT IN ('Satisfied', 'Waived') THEN DATEDIFF(day, due_date, CURRENT_DATE) ELSE 0 END

properties.description: Number of days past the due date by the employee
Month when training was assigned (for cohort analysis) by the employee

columns.name: is_satisfied_late
columns.expression: CASE WHEN satisfied_late = true THEN true ELSE false END

properties.description: Boolean indicator for late completion by the employee
Cornerstone OnDemand training records and completion tracking by the employee

measure.name: completion_rate
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN transcript_status = 'Satisfied' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)

measure.name: late_completions
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN is_satisfied_late = true THEN 1 END)

measure.name: on_time_completions
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN transcript_status = 'Satisfied' AND is_satisfied_late = false THEN 1 END)

properties.description: Core metrics for training assignments and completions

measure.name: team_completion_rate
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN transcript_status = 'Satisfied' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)

measure.name: team_overdue_count
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN is_overdue = true THEN 1 END)

measure.name: team_past_due_rate
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN is_overdue = true THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)

measure.name: team_late_submissions
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN is_satisfied_late = true THEN 1 END)

measure.name: team_late_submission_rate
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN is_satisfied_late = true THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN transcript_status = 'Satisfied' THEN 1 END), 0)

properties.description: Metrics for manager team training oversight and performance

measure.name: late_submission_percentage
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN is_satisfied_late = true THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN transcript_status = 'Satisfied' THEN 1 END), 0)

measure.name: on_time_percentage
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN transcript_status = 'Satisfied' AND is_satisfied_late = false THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN transcript_status = 'Satisfied' THEN 1 END), 0)

measure.name: avg_days_overdue
measure.expression: AVG(CASE WHEN days_overdue > 0 THEN days_overdue END)

properties.description: Metrics focused on training completion timing and delays

measure.name: role_completion_rate
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN transcript_status = 'Satisfied' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)

measure.name: role_late_rate
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN is_satisfied_late = true THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN transcript_status = 'Satisfied' THEN 1 END), 0)

measure.name: role_overdue_count
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN is_overdue = true THEN 1 END)

properties.description: Training effectiveness metrics by job role and position

measure.name: activity_completion_rate
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN transcript_status = 'Satisfied' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)

measure.name: activity_late_completions
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN is_satisfied_late = true THEN 1 END)

properties.description: Performance metrics for individual training activities and curricula

measure.name: division_completion_rate
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN transcript_status = 'Satisfied' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)

measure.name: division_overdue_rate
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN is_overdue = true THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)

measure.name: division_late_rate
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN is_satisfied_late = true THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN transcript_status = 'Satisfied' THEN 1 END), 0)

properties.description: Comparative metrics across business divisions

cumulativeMetrics.name: monthly_completion_trend
cumulativeMetrics.description: Track monthly completion trends over time

properties.description: Cumulative tracking of training completions by month
Track assignment patterns and spikes over quarters

cumulativeMetrics.name: cohort_completion_analysis
cumulativeMetrics.description: Analyze completion rates for assignment cohorts

measure.name: cohort_completion_rate
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN transcript_status = 'Satisfied' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)

properties.description: Track how assignment cohorts perform over time

views.name: top_training_activities
views.statement: SELECT training_title, COUNT(CASE WHEN transcript_status = 'Satisfied' THEN 1 END) as completion_count, COUNT(*) as total_assignments, COUNT(CASE WHEN transcript_status = 'Satisfied' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) as completion_rate FROM csod_training_records GROUP BY training_title ORDER BY completion_count DESC LIMIT 5

properties.description: Training activities with highest completion counts

views.name: division_position_heatmap
views.statement: SELECT division, position, COUNT(CASE WHEN transcript_status = 'Satisfied' THEN 1 END) as completions, COUNT(*) as assignments FROM csod_training_records GROUP BY division, position

properties.description: Completion data for heatmap visualization by division and position

views.name: overdue_analysis
views.statement: SELECT * FROM csod_training_records WHERE is_overdue = true ORDER BY days_overdue DESC

properties.description: All overdue training assignments with days overdue

views.name: manager_performance_summary
views.statement: SELECT manager_name, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) as team_size, COUNT(*) as total_assignments, COUNT(CASE WHEN transcript_status = 'Satisfied' THEN 1 END) as completions, COUNT(CASE WHEN transcript_status = 'Satisfied' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) as completion_rate, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_overdue = true THEN 1 END) as overdue_count FROM csod_training_records GROUP BY manager_name ORDER BY completion_rate DESC

properties.description: Team performance metrics by manager

views.name: training_status_breakdown
views.statement: SELECT transcript_status, COUNT(*) as count, COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM csod_training_records) as percentage FROM csod_training_records GROUP BY transcript_status ORDER BY count DESC

properties.description: Distribution of training transcript statuses

views.name: late_completion_analysis
views.statement: SELECT division, position, manager_name, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_satisfied_late = true THEN 1 END) as late_completions, COUNT(CASE WHEN transcript_status = 'Satisfied' THEN 1 END) as total_completions, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_satisfied_late = true THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN transcript_status = 'Satisfied' THEN 1 END), 0) as late_percentage FROM csod_training_records GROUP BY division, position, manager_name HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN transcript_status = 'Satisfied' THEN 1 END) > 0 ORDER BY late_percentage DESC

properties.description: Analysis of late completions by division, position, and manager

views.name: monthly_completion_timeline
views.statement: SELECT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM completed_date) as completion_month, COUNT(*) as completions FROM csod_training_records WHERE completed_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM completed_date) ORDER BY completion_month

properties.description: Month-by-month completion timeline for trend analysis
Possible training transcript status values
Business divisions in the organization
